info.title: Ageix Human Interface Decision Inbox
info.description: Read-only Open WebUI-compatible registration surface for the Ageix Human Interface Decision Inbox. Ageix remains the system of record and authorization authority.

servers.description: Production Ageix gateway when publicly enabled
Local Ageix Human Interface Adapter development server

get.description: Returns the read-only, project-scoped Ageix Human Interface Decision Inbox. This operation does not approve, reject, defer, request changes, trigger workers, mutate repository state, or store Open WebUI approval state.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Explicit Ageix project context. Must be exactly Ageix.

200.description: Read-only Decision Inbox response from Ageix.

403.description: Access denied by Ageix authorization or project-scope enforcement.

BearerAuth.description: Ageix-issued or gateway-accepted bearer token. Open WebUI shell identity is not sufficient by itself.
